notes: 2026-07-01 nightly: CRITICAL BUG FOUND AND FIXED — review.py _self_improve() (runs nightly at 23:00 UTC, separate from this 02:00 UTC session) had a TP_RATIO auto-ratchet using blended wins/decided ("TP hit rate") across ALL 34 historical trades. Since CM Sling Shot (rebuilt 2026-06-25) has 0 closed trades, that blended rate was 100% pre-rebuild old-system data, yet it silently cut TP_RATIO 2.0→1.75 (06-29 night) →1.5 (06-30 night), undoing 4+ nightly sessions of evidenced 1:2 RR calibration. Same anti-pattern as the MIN_SCORE ratchet bug fixed 2026-06-16 (blended WR used to auto-tighten a parameter), except the sibling TP_RATIO block in the same function was never disabled. Fixed: TP_RATIO auto-adjust block in review.py disabled (mirrors MIN_SCORE disable). TP_RATIO restored to 2.0 in trader.py + config. ATOM SHORT still open (day 8): trail SL $1.6104, peak $1.4911, locking +76.7% leveraged (up from +63.4%), 9 trail updates now. CM Sling Shot still has 0 closed trades — MIN_SCORE, signal weights, ADX thresholds NOT touched (no valid new-system data). Other auto-adjust blocks in review.py _self_improve() (MIN_ADX, RISK_PCT, MAX_TRADES, WATCHLIST suspension, SESSION hours) share the same blended-all-time-data flaw but have not been caught drifting yet — flagged for future audit, not touched tonight (surgical fix only, no confirmed harm).
